name: International CSRC Investment Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: International CSRC Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. produces and sells carbon black for tire and other rubber products worldwide. Its products are also used in applications, such as pigments, plastics, chemical fiber products, conductive materials, etc. The company also engages in the biotechnology and pharmaceutical research and development activities. In addition, it produces and sells lithium batteries; and provides investment services, investment consultation services, carbon black transportation services, and technology services. The company was formerly known as China Synthetic Rubber Corporation and changed its name to International CSRC Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. in October 2018. International CSRC Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
